page: Microsoft Azure D128ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture using Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 128 dedicated virtual CPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type includes 7559 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not feature any graphics processing units. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing consistent processing capabilities for large-scale workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D128ds_v7 offers high resource density within the general-purpose tier, consolidating substantial compute and memory resources into a single virtual machine. A key tradeoff is the lack of specialized hardware accelerators like GPUs, which limits its applicability for deep learning tasks. The balanced resource profile and large local storage capacity make this server type appropriate for relational databases, enterprise applications, and large-scale general-purpose workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure D128ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, powered by an Intel x86_64 processor on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance includes 7559 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware. This high-density configuration provides significant compute and memory capacity on a single node, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for consolidating large enterprise workloads. The primary tradeoff is the absence of hardware acceleration, which makes it less suitable for graphics or machine learning training. It is designed for workloads such as large-scale databases, enterprise application hosting, and general-purpose data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage, designed for databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated x86 processors, balanced memory allocation, and extensive local storage capacity.
